en: How do you pronounce this word
The first vowel is eh like pen but some people make it an
ko: 첫 번째 모음은 eh, pen처럼. 하지만 어떤 사람들은 ih로

en: ih like pin but it's eh pen Now what about this letter
ko: 발음하기도 해. pin처럼. 하지만 eh, pen이야. 이 글자는 어때?

en: It can be pronounced with an N like pen guin but it can also be
ko: N으로 발음할 수도 있어, pen-guin처럼. 하지만

en: peng ng peng guin pen guin or peng
ko: peng, ng, peng-guin. pen-guin 또는 peng-

en: guin How do you pronounce this word
